From the original step 69 log tail, the last message was:

So the previous attempt DID pass through the groups phase, did track assignment, and got to the 0th routing iteration before dying. The current step 70 is at "Complete 20000 groups" which suggests it's still in the initialization phase.

This makes sense - DRT starts from scratch each time (there's no ODB checkpoint save within DRT itself - the drt-run-0 ODB is a pre-DRT checkpoint). So we're re-running the full DRT init.

Given the design size (227K instances, 98.5K nets), the groups phase alone may take 20-30 minutes. Let me wait longer.
